title: lithocardium elaeagnoides
intro: Lithocardium elaeagnoides, also known as the Russian olive, is a shrub or small tree native to Europe and Asia, known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its astringent and diuretic effects, which help to reduce swelling and relieve digestive issues. The health benefits of Lithocardium elaeagnoides include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. Lithocardium elaeagnoides is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or powder for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness in modern medicine.
